chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-45 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.11.2025 *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. This petition is pending since 2024 without any useful progress, which prima facie reflects lack of interest on part of the petitioner. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
